Next he speaks of the characteristics of unproductive and

There would neither be prosperity nor rain in the land, should
the clouds be rough and small, tossed about by the wind, have the
shapes of camels, crows, dead bodies, monkeys or other inauspicious
creatures, and be silent.

If the Sun should shine with burning rays in a cloudless sky
and the sky at night with bright stars look blooming like a lake with
lily blossoms, there would be plentiful rain.
